summary: A public atlas of the Master Bundle packets, showing which archives are live inputs, authority layers, handoffs, or reference materials.
final_use_case: It prevents the 152-bundle corpus from becoming invisible; a reader can see what each packet is for without mistaking every archive for a finished live product.

instruments.instrument_name: Master Bundle Pages Artifact Identity Register
instruments.input: packet name, source files, version signal, scope, and intended destination
instruments.operation: A public atlas of the Master Bundle packets, showing which archives are live inputs, authority layers, handoffs, or reference materials.
instruments.output: what the packet is and what decision it can still change
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires packet name, source files, version signal, scope, and intended destination
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds what the packet is and what decision it can still change; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.
instruments.proof: Expected proof artifact: what the packet is and what decision it can still change
instruments.status: Status: native public port complete for upload and navigation; substantive source-project verification remains limited by the source lineage ceiling and the.
instruments.gap: Verify one representative case: the step should accept packet name, source files, version signal, scope, and intended destination and produce what the packet is and what decision it can still change.
instruments.verification_check: Test one representative case; confirm input (packet name, source files, version signal, scope...) produces output (what the packet is and what decision it can still...) and leaves a visible decision or artifact.

instruments.instrument_name: Master Bundle Pages Extraction And Manifest Layer
instruments.input: files, tables, text, screenshots, source notes, and provenance markers
instruments.operation: Heuer. Loads cognitive-bias and intelligence-analysis failure modes. CIA Tradecraft Primer. Loads structured analytic technique selection and use conditions. Pherson and Pherson. Loads practical tradecraft: indicators, ACH, key assumptions, diagnosticity, and challenge procedures. Tetlock. Loads judgment calibration, forecasting humility, and expert-performance limits. Kahneman. Loads bias, heuristics, and slow/fast cognition as an error-control vocabulary. A page-family source-use record exists. Final citation.
instruments.output: what can be safely mined from the packet as a reviewable artifact
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires files, tables, text, screenshots, source notes, and provenance markers
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds what can be safely mined from the packet as a reviewable artifact; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.
instruments.proof: Expected proof artifact: what can be safely mined from the packet as a reviewable artifact
instruments.status: Status: native public port complete for upload and navigation; substantive source-project verification remains limited by the source lineage ceiling and the.
instruments.gap: Verify one representative case: the step should accept files, tables, text, screenshots, source notes, and provenance markers and produce what can be safely mined from the packet as a reviewable artifact.
instruments.verification_check: Test one representative case; confirm input (files, tables, text, screenshots, source notes...) produces output (what can be safely mined from the packet...) and leaves a visible decision or artifact.
